macro_markets.query: What are the most important macroeconomic and stock market news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include major index movements, Fed/central bank news, and significant company earnings or announcements.

gaming.query: What are the most notable video game and gaming industry news from the past 24 hours? Include game releases, announcements, esports, and industry developments.

items.title: Nintendo Direct delivers major Switch 2 announcements, including new Final Fantasy, Dragon Quest, and Zelda reveal
items.summary: Multiple summaries of today’s Nintendo Direct describe a dense slate of Switch 2 news, including Final Fantasy X/X-2 HD Remaster, Metaphor: ReFantazio, Minecraft Switch 2 Edition, Dragon Quest Monsters: The Withered World, and a new Zelda: Ocarina of Time remake/reveal. Several titles also received release dates or platform confirmations.

items.title: Nintendo Direct roundup highlights JRPG-heavy lineup and Switch 2 updates
items.summary: Coverage of Nintendo’s latest Direct says the showcase leaned heavily toward JRPG fans, with new Xenoblade Chronicles, Fire Emblem release timing, Kingdom Hearts IV-related news, and additional Switch 2 support for major third-party games. The same roundup also mentions new details for Splatoon Raiders, Pokopia DLC, Rhythm Heaven Groove, and Tales of Eternia.

items.title: Xbox reportedly rethinks exclusivity strategy while pulling a Gears video featuring a PS5 logo
items.summary: A gaming-news roundup says Xbox removed a Gears of War promotional video that had included a PS5 logo, shortly after messaging the title as an Xbox console exclusive. The discussion also frames this as part of a broader reconsideration of Xbox’s recent multiplatform approach.

items.title: Star Fox development rumor points to Velan Studios
items.summary: One of the circulating gaming-news items from the past day says Velan Studios is the developer for a new Star Fox project, marking a notable potential comeback for the Nintendo franchise. The claim appears in multiple news roundup discussions, but it remains a reported item rather than an official Nintendo announcement.

items.title: Monster Hunter World surpasses 30 million cumulative sales
items.summary: A gaming-news roundup reports that Monster Hunter World has crossed 30 million units in lifetime sales worldwide, underscoring the franchise’s continued commercial strength. This is framed alongside other major industry updates and platform announcements.

tech_news.query: What are the most important technology news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include major product launches, company news, and significant tech industry developments. Exclude AI-specific news.
